title: tephrosia pinnata
intro: Tephrosia pinnata, also known as the horsefly tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tephrosia pinnata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia pinnata include infusions and decoctions of the roots and leaves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
